formRaceEntries.comment: Jumped Fast Straight To The Front Settled Down 2 Lengths Clear race run to suit same to straightening up Ridden Along , run down x 100m, and was no match at all - # had its chance
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Underwent a pre-race vet exam after being fractious in the tie-up stalls, and was deemed suitable to start. Began awkwardly.

formRaceEntries.comment: Jumped Ok Restrained Settled Down 6th Outside 6 Lengths Clear All The Way asked to go at the 400m, quickened from 300m ran Leader down x 100m kept on strong to line - # impressive
Jumped Ok Not Bustled Settled Down 4th Outside 4 Lengths enjoyed good trail with 1st following 2 Lengths behind, Under Pressure x 400m clear run home Kept Trying but (b/1st) # not quick enough
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Began awkwardly. Passing the 400m was bumped.

formRaceEntries.comment: Trailed the leader and battled on solidly in the Widden, peaking on her run 100m out. Trialled since. Keep in mind.
Jumped Fast Took sit 2nd Outside 2 Lengths race run to suit Ridden Along Straightening Up Held Ground to 200m, couldn't finish off - # had its chance
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Over the concluding stages was bumped.

formRaceEntries.comment: Trialled well before beating some older maidens leading all the way on debut. Tougher here, but have to keep safe.
Made little impression on the quinella at Canberra first up, but she will improve rising in trip. Minor claims.
Jumped Ok Not Bustled Settled Down Run Of Race 3rd Inside 3 Lengths Under Pressure x 400m, kept trying without threatening - held-up final 50m, # kept on behind
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Passing the 400m made contact with another runner when attempting to improve, however when disappointed for this run, was then shifted back in to obtain clear running approaching the 300m. Held up over the final 50m and could not be fully ridden out to the end of the race.

formRaceEntries.comment: Not enough pace on to suit fresh, but she didn't beat one home. 1200m helps and improvement is likely, but how much?
Bit Slow Out Settled Down 5th Inside 1st 5 Lengths Clear All The Way Just Kept Going One Pace - # Just Held Ground

Jumped Ok Restrained from Outside Settled Down last 10 Lengths had too much to do from there, held together much same to straightening up clear run home Outside Never Likely - Need To See Again Weaker - # got too far back
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Soon after the start was hampered.

formRaceEntries.comment: Jumped Ok Restrained thus Settled Down 8th Outside 8 Lengths following 1st x 2 Lengths held together much same to straightening up 6th x 300m, 5th x line, # Sound eff/finale
formRaceEntries.commentStewards: Began awkwardly. Got its head up and raced keenly when being restrained in the early stages in an endeavour to obtain cover.

formRaceEntries.comment: Held ground in an even debut run. Well bred filly who should be suited stepping up to 1200m, but place preferred.
Slow Out 1 Lengths Settled Down 7th Inside 8 Lengths Hard Ridden x 400m couldn't quicken last x 300m, # did nothing
